title: El Mencho: Drug lord buried in golden coffin in Mexico
author: FRANCE24
fullText:

 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 16:08Modified: 03/03/2026 - 16:12
summary: People gathered beside a gold-colored coffin that, according to local media reports, contained the body of cartel leader Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as “El Mencho,” who was killed on February 22 during a military operation in the state of Jalisco.
